uplink.description: Battery, temperature, and humidity (TTN example bytes)
Negative temperature (synthetic, exercises signed LE decode)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data authored from the upstream reference decoder (battery 100, temperature -1 C, humidity 45.5 %), normalized to vocabulary keys.

uplink.description: Temperature & humidity history datalog uplink (synthetic, one prior reading)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected values from the upstream reference decoder (0x20/0xCE history: epoch 1700000000, temperature 23.5 C, humidity 60 %). Upstream emits a raw `timestamp` (epoch seconds); per AUTHORING.md we normalize it to an RFC3339 `time` and put the prior reading under `history[].air`.

uplink.description: Current reading plus one history point (synthetic, exercises top-level + history coexistence)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected values from the upstream reference decoder (battery 80, temperature 21 C, humidity 55 %, history epoch 1700000000 / temperature 20 C / humidity 50 %), normalized to vocabulary keys with the prior reading in `history`.

Synthetic input. The upstream reference decoder has no error path for unknown channels (it returns an empty object); our codec reports an explicit error per the repo's standard, so expected.errors is authored here rather than taken from upstream.
